title: FAMILY CONNECTS - 211info
text: POLK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH FAMILY CONNECTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A nurse visiting program that offers up to four scheduled nurse visits to support families with a newborn. Provides overall health checks, help with feeding and bathing, and support for birthing parents with postpartum depression. Nurses also help connect families with community resources to promote parents’ health and children’s well-being. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 302 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Birth, adoptive, or resource families with a newborn 0-12 weeks Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 623-8175 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 623-8175 Main phone (503) 623-8175 Public Health Information Line (503) 831-3499 FAX Main phone (503) 623-8175 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit the website for information or to request a visit if one was not set up at the hospital. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINATIONS AND TUBERCULOSIS SCREENINGS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. POLK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
